'''bashumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oakness|oakness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-sh-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oakness|oakness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| bashumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæshimith|bæshimith]] || [[word:bæshimij|bæshimij]] || [[word:bæshimish|bæshimish]] || [[word:bæshimi|bæshimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bashushumuth|bashushumuth]] || [[word:bashushumuj|bashushumuj]] || [[word:bashushumush|bashushumush]] || [[word:bashushumu|bashushumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bashumuth|bashumuth]] || [[word:bashumuj|bashumuj]] || [[word:bashumush|bashumush]] || [[word:bashumu|bashumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bashufmufth|bashufmufth]] || [[word:bashufmufj|bashufmufj]] || [[word:bashufmufsh|bashufmufsh]] || [[word:bashufmuf|bashufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bashumuthu|bashumuthu]] || [[word:bashumuju|bashumuju]] || [[word:bashumushu|bashumushu]] || [[word:bashumuku|bashumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bashumuth|bashumuth]] || [[word:bashumuj|bashumuj]] || [[word:bashumush|bashumush]] || [[word:bashumu|bashumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bashumuthul|bashumuthul]] || [[word:bashumujul|bashumujul]] || [[word:bashumushul|bashumushul]] || [[word:bashumukul|bashumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bashumuuthuthu|bashumuuthuthu]] || [[word:bashumuujuju|bashumuujuju]] || [[word:bashumuushushu|bashumuushushu]] || [[word:bashumuuku|bashumuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bashumuthun|bashumuthun]] || [[word:bashumujun|bashumujun]] || [[word:bashumushun|bashumushun]] || [[word:bashumukun|bashumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bashumuthuoro|bashumuthuoro]] || [[word:bashumujuoro|bashumujuoro]] || [[word:bashumushuoro|bashumushuoro]] || [[word:bashumukuoro|bashumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5551a29}}
